hero.sub_tagline: A small cleaning team serving Sukhumvit & Makkasan condos.

services.heading: Five ways we keep your home spotless.

items.title: Same cleaner, every visit.
items.body: No rotating strangers. You'll know your cleaner by name — and they'll know your home, your preferences, where you keep the spare cloths.

items.title: Fully insured.
items.body: Third-party liability insurance on every clean. Policy details available on request.

items.title: Direct booking on LINE.
items.body: Message us directly. Confirmation within 30 minutes — no app, no middleman, no surprise fees.

items.title: Bilingual team.
items.body: English and Thai. We serve expat and Thai residents with the same care.

slides: Phrom Phong condo, studio, deep clean

areas.note: Don't see your soi? Message us — we may serve nearby.

items.quote: Came home to my apartment looking better than when I moved in. Same cleaner every week now.
items.name: Anna K.

items.quote: They actually know my building — even the back service entrance. Saves me so much explaining.
items.name: Khun Pim

items.quote: Booked via LINE in 10 minutes. No app. No subscription. Just a clean apartment.
items.name: David M.

testimonials.disclaimer: Real reviews coming soon — we just launched.

items.a: Yes. We carry third-party liability insurance on every clean. If anything is ever damaged during a visit, we handle it professionally. Policy details are available on request.

items.q: Do you bring your own supplies?
items.a: Yes, all cleaning supplies and equipment are included in the price. If you'd prefer we use specific products — or need eco-friendly supplies — just let us know when booking.

items.q: What if I'm not happy with the clean?
items.a: Message us on LINE within 24 hours and we'll return to fix any area you're not satisfied with, at no extra charge. We'd rather spend an extra 30 minutes than lose your trust.

items.q: Can I request the same cleaner each visit?
items.a: That's exactly how we work. Your cleaner learns your home over time — your preferences, your space, your quirks. We don't rotate staff on your unit without good reason.
Cash on the day of your clean, or bank transfer beforehand. We'll confirm payment details when you book via LINE. No in-app payments, no subscription traps.
Sukhumvit (Asoke, Phrom Phong, Thonglor, Ekkamai) and Makkasan. If you're just outside these areas, message us — we may be able to help depending on schedule.
Yes. Our team is bilingual (English and Thai), so expat residents and Thai residents are served with equal care. You'll never need to use hand gestures to explain what you need.

items.q: How do I cancel or reschedule?
items.a: Message us on LINE at least 24 hours before your booking and we'll reschedule with no fee. Cancellations with less than 24 hours notice may incur a small fee for the cleaner's travel time.

footer.tagline_thai: สะอาดทีละซอย

booking.heading: Three quick questions.
booking.subtext: We'll open LINE with your selections pre-filled. Reply with any details, we confirm within 30 minutes.
